prediction.reasoning: The point estimate is set to the current price ($77.74), as this serves as the most neutral short-term prediction in the absence of specific market-moving news or in-depth fundamental/technical analysis. The confidence intervals are calculated using an assumed historical daily volatility for CSCO (approximately 1.2%), scaled for a 3-day period using statistical methods (square root of time rule and standard Z-scores for respective confidence levels). This method accounts for typical price fluctuations, acknowledging the inherent unpredictability of stock markets. This is not financial advice.
